column1: # Tomba! (SCUS_942.36) — function annotations for PSXRecomp code generator

column2: PS1 cooperative thread scheduler — iterates TCB array at 0x801FD800 (stride 0x70)
column3: dispatches threads with state=2 (ready). Leaves loop-end value in scratchpad after each call. VBlank ISR would reset state 4→2 on real hardware; we do it on fiber yield instead.

column2: ChangeThread(handle) — cooperative fiber switch; suspends caller
entity tick dispatcher — iterates 200 entity slots at 0x800A5970 (stride 0xD4); dispatches each active entity's handler
camera entity handler — reads from camera entity at 0x800A38B8; confirmed working
entity_ptr helper — returns entity pointer (not 0); required for pig-throw to work correctly

column3: pushes to pending list at scratchpad[0x204]

column2: secondary entity dispatcher — iterates 0x800B07D8 pool (4 slots
column4: dispatches via table_8007d6a4[entity[2]]; handles projectiles and thrown weapons

weapon/projectile dispatch chain — called from FUN_80034524; routes weapon attack logic

display thread entry — state machine (states 9→10→0xB→0→1→4); TCB[0] display fiber. TCB[0]+0x48/0x58 = draw callback pointers for buffer A/B
